text.title: Spring Async Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for adopting Spring @Async safely on an existing Spring Boot service.

step.name: identify-candidate
step.input: Method profile: blocking I/O, no return value needed by caller, idempotent on retry.
step.action: Confirm method is fire-and-forget OR caller can wait on CompletableFuture. Check method is not @Transactional. Check caller bean != target bean.
step.decision-gate: If caller == target bean, MUST extract to new bean before proceeding.

step.name: configure-executor
step.action: Create @Configuration class with @EnableAsync. Define named ThreadPoolTaskExecutor bean: corePoolSize, maxPoolSize, queueCapacity, threadNamePrefix, CallerRunsPolicy, setWaitForTasksToCompleteOnShutdown(true), setAwaitTerminationSeconds(60), TaskDecorator (MDC + SecurityContext + OTel).
step.decision-gate: If TaskDecorator missing, STOP — observability is broken.

step.name: annotate-method
step.action: Annotate @Async("executorName"). Change return type to CompletableFuture<Void> OR keep void + register AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler. Remove @Transactional if present.
step.output: Method annotated and returning observable Future.
step.decision-gate: If method still @Transactional, STOP and split.

step.name: wire-metrics-and-handler
step.action: Register Micrometer gauges: executor.queued, executor.active, executor.completed, executor.rejected. Wire AsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler in AsyncConfig that logs + increments error counter.

step.name: test-with-awaitility
step.input: Test class + WireMock for downstream stubs.
step.action: Use Awaitility's await().atMost(2, SECONDS).untilAsserted(...) to poll completion. Never Thread.sleep. Run audit script (spring-async-audit.sh) before merge.
